parameters.name: reorder
parameters.label: Reorder
parameters.description: This parameter allows you to reorder either rows or columns.

parameters.name: method
parameters.label: Method
parameters.description: Specify how to reorder the table.

parameters.name: before
parameters.label: Before
parameters.description: The rows or columns to copy or swap from.

parameters.name: after
parameters.label: After
parameters.description: The rows or columns to copy or swap to.

parameters.name: order
parameters.label: Order
parameters.description: The order of input rows and columns to copy.

parameters.name: delete
parameters.label: Delete Unspecified
parameters.description: Only available when Method is 'In Specified Order by Name' or 'In Specified Order by Index'. It will delete any row/column not listed in the Order parameter.

parameters.name: language
parameters.label: Language
parameters.description: Select how the decides which script language to operate on.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.label: Edit/View Extension
parameters.description: Select the file extension this should expose to external editors.

parameters.name: wordwrap
parameters.label: Word Wrap
parameters.description: Enable Word Wrap for Node Display.
